_comment: eChan companion seed content — Phase 1b. Hand-editable. Reload page to apply. Categories: welcome, greeting, education, fun, network, idle, easter, ambient. Trigger types: welcome:firstVisit, welcome:returning, time:morning|afternoon|evening|night, network:quiet|busy, idle:short, idle:long, random, manual. priority: 1 (low) / 2 (medium) / 3 (high). emotion: neutral | happy | thinking | alert | celebrate | sleepy. weight: relative pick probability inside category (default 1). ttlOnce: true = never repeat across sessions once seen.

lines.text: Hey 👋 I'm eChan — your eCash co-pilot. I stay quiet by default. Switch me to Chatty in settings if you want more from me.
Welcome back ✨ The chain's been ticking while you were away.
Hey, you're back. Let's see what's happening on-chain.
Morning ☀️ Coffee's brewing, blocks are landing. Let's see what XEC does today.
Early start? The mempool's still warming up.
Afternoon. Prime time to watch the flow 🌊
Evening 🌆 The chain hums on, regardless of the hour.
Burning the midnight oil? 🌙 The mempool's calm — nice time to read tx details without distraction.
Late shift. The chain doesn't sleep, even if you should 😉
Pre-consensus is what makes eCash feel instant 💡 Avalanche locks a tx in ~3s — long before it's buried in a block. No more 'wait for confirmations'.
How does pre-consensus work? Stakers vote on each tx before it's mined. ~3s later they all agree — and that's final. No reversals.
Post-consensus is block-level Avalanche 🔒 Once a block is locked, no chain reorg can undo it. Different from pre-consensus, which works on individual txs.
TTF = Time To Finality ⏱️ How long until a tx is irreversible. Sub-second to a few seconds on a healthy chain. The ⚠ icon means the node feed is offline.
TPS = transactions per second 📊 eCash targets 5M long-term. What you're seeing now is the warm-up — current limits, not theoretical ones.
The mempool is the chain's waiting room 🚪 Txs sit here for ~3s under pre-consensus, then get locked in. On Bitcoin they'd wait ~10 minutes per confirm.
Agora is eCash's peer-to-peer token marketplace 🏪 No central exchange, no order books — just on-chain offers anyone can take. Settlement in seconds.
How Agora works: seller posts a token offer on-chain. Buyer claims it with a single tx. No middleman, no custody, no waiting period.
Chronik is eCash's indexer 🗂️ It's how wallets and dashboards (like this one) actually query history fast. Without it, you'd be parsing raw blocks yourself.
Heartbeat is eCash's real-time difficulty algorithm 💓 It keeps blocks at a steady ~10min interval — way more consistent than the chain it forked from.
IFP = Infrastructure Funding Policy. A slice of each mined block funds eCash core development 🛠️ Self-sustaining funding, no foundation begging.
Avalanche stakers are the ~3s magic 🗳️ Run a node, lock some XEC, and your vote helps finalize txs. Decentralization with skin in the game.
SLP is the original token protocol on this chain lineage. ALP is the eCash evolution — same ideas, refined. Both still work; ALP is where new tokens are heading.
CashFusion txs have many similar-amount inputs and outputs 🥷 Privacy mixing on-chain. The participants agree off-chain, settle in one batch tx.
Miners sometimes leave messages in the coinbase tx 📜 The first input of every block carries notes, signals, sometimes jokes. eCash blocks have personality.
Fun unit fact 🪙 1 XEC = 100 satoshis. eCash redenominated to keep numbers human-readable — no more counting decimals like the old chain.
Your wallet doesn't really 'hold XEC' — the chain does 🌐 You hold private keys that prove ownership of unspent outputs (UTXOs). Lose the keys, lose the access.
eCash addresses start with 'ecash:qq...' 📬 They're derived from public keys via hashing — one-way, so the address never reveals the key behind it.
Big CashFusion round once finalized 3,200 tx in 60 seconds 🍿 Watching it scroll by was like popcorn popping.
BTC: 'wait 60 minutes to be sure.' eCash: 'why wait?' ⚡ Same lineage, different priorities.
My name? Just eChan. e for eCash, chan for ... well, you'll figure it out 😉
Tokens on eCash mean the chain isn't just money — it's a venue 🎪 Mints, trades, marketplaces, all settling in seconds.
Quiet stretch 😴 Mempool's idling. Perfect time to dig into tx details without rush.
Slow lane today. Even stakers need a coffee break ☕
Mempool's heating up 🔥 Could be a fusion round, an airdrop, or a token mint going viral.
Look at that flow! ⚡ TPS is climbing — pre-consensus stakers are getting their workout.
Still here 👁️ Just watching the chain do its thing.
Calm chain. Sometimes the most interesting thing is when nothing dramatic happens.
You still there? 😴 No worries, I'll keep watching.
Long quiet stretch. Hope you're getting something good done elsewhere ✨
Okay okay, I'm flattered 😏 What do you want?
Ten out of ten click rate 🌟 You found the easter egg.
Hmm? You poked me. I exist 🤨 What's up.
Random thought 💭 — every confirmed tx you see was independently checked by hundreds of nodes. Distributed trust, in real time.
Some addresses on this chain have been quietly active for years. The chain remembers everything — graceful or messy.
Watching a block land is watching consensus crystallize 🧊 Hundreds of independent observers all arriving at the same answer at the same time.
The whole chain runs on math nobody's broken in 15+ years 🧮 Hashing, signatures, consensus — all open, all checkable.
Avalanche didn't replace mining on eCash — it works alongside it 🤝 Miners produce blocks, stakers vote on order. Two systems, one chain.
